attribution: National Center for Chronic Disease Prevention and Health Promotion (U.S.).
modification_notice: Extracted complete Simplified Chinese sentences from the checksum-pinned PDF with pypdf 5.9.0, applied Unicode NFC and conservative PDF-whitespace normalization, removed exact within-source duplicates, and added input-only candidate metadata; headings without sentence punctuation, fragments, and converter output were excluded, and no expected text was used.
known_biases: A children's oral-health activity booklet is not representative of ordinary Taiwan product traffic.
PDF layout extraction is intentionally conservative and excludes fragments and labels without sentence punctuation.
Domain and conversion-risk labels remain unset until input-only review.
A maximum of 10% of the final candidate pool may come from this source.
